name: hey-listen
description: system utilities for coding agents — sounds, notifications, toasts, screen overlays, window info, and a fairy
author: Nate Weinert

scripts.build: swiftc -O -swift-version 5 -framework AppKit -framework AVFoundation -framework UserNotifications -framework IOKit -framework CoreGraphics -parse-as-library -target arm64-apple-macosx13.0 Sources/hey-listen/agent_ping.swift -o hey-listen
scripts.postinstall: npm run build || echo 'build failed — requires macOS + Xcode CLI tools'
